panels.purpose: Show all disabled update authorities.

registry_rules: Panel registration does not create routes or apply updates.

action_rules: Disabled buttons make blocked authorities visible.
No cockpit button executes updates in this phase.

summary.title: S575 Governed Update Readiness Demo
summary.operator_message: Governed update readiness runway is complete through S575. Next build session should move to web/source/search issues.

first_blocks_to_consider_lifting.planned_change: allow evidence-only source discovery after source registry and trust tiers exist

handoff_rules: S575 ends the current governed update readiness session.
After S575, move to web/source/search issues.
Do not remove update application blocks as part of S575.
The first internet change should be evidence-only governed source discovery.

stop_point: STOP POINT D - end-to-end governed update readiness demo complete; move next to web/source/search issues.
next_phase: Web/source/search issues: governed source registry, trust tiers, need diagnosis, and evidence-only search.
